title: claude-dotfiles — Shared Configuration
description: Portable settings that live in your private config repo. Defines canonical variable names and preferences. Safe to commit — contains no paths or secrets.

variables.description: Canonical variable names and what they represent. Keys are variable names used as $NAME in Claude sessions and must match keys in every machine's machine.json. Values are human-readable descriptions — not paths.

commands_enabled.description: Which built-in commands from the public repo to activate. Names match filenames in commands/ without the .md extension.

preferences.description: Behavioural preferences applied across all Claude sessions.

greeting_once_per_day.description: Show the greeting only on the first session of each calendar day.

seclog_on_session_start.description: Run /seclog automatically at the start of every session that does not begin with the full greeting.
